heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 9011 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of the Convention and this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note under and Tables.Pub. L. 100–300102 Stat. 437section 9001 of this titleApr. 29, 1988
